calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Avid Alavi for Thomas A. Lucas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired about John Burch's Durable Power of Attorney (DPOA) and whether he was properly served. Ms. Alavi confirmed that John Burch was served via his DPOA agent, Linda Turiello, at the address where he receives all financial documents. Linda Turiello has been acting as John Birch's DPOA since May 15, 2023, managing his financial matters without issue. John Burch is aware of his brother's passing and has participated in decisions regarding final arrangements.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 2, 2009, is admitted to probate. Thomas A. Lucas is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for February 17, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
